knowledge_base.question: What is web development?
knowledge_base.answer: Website creation using frontend and backend technologies to build functional web applications.

knowledge_base.question: How long does a website take to build?
knowledge_base.answer: 3–6 weeks depending on features, design, and complexity.

knowledge_base.question: What technologies do you use?
knowledge_base.answer: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, WordPress.

knowledge_base.question: What is responsive design?
knowledge_base.answer: Websites that adapt to mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

knowledge_base.answer: Yes, fully custom websites based on business requirements.

knowledge_base.question: What technologies do you use?
knowledge_base.answer: We use HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, WordPress, Shopify, and AWS.

knowledge_base.question: What type of projects can you build?
knowledge_base.answer: We have successfully delivered diverse projects including Testherapy (Healthcare Platform), Diamonds Or Jewels (Luxury eCommerce), Invoice Builder Demo (Business Tool), and an AI-powered ChatGPT Clone.

knowledge_base.question: Tell me the technology stack of the projects.
knowledge_base.answer: Our projects use modern stacks: Testherapy (HTML5, CSS3, JS, SEO), Diamonds Or Jewels (WordPress, WooCommerce, Elementor, PHP), Invoice Builder (React.js, Vercel), and ChatGPT Clone (Next.js, Node.js, Express, OpenAI API).

knowledge_base.question: What is Testherapy?
knowledge_base.answer: Testherapy is a healthcare and diagnostic services platform designed to help users access medical testing services online through a modern and user-friendly website.

knowledge_base.question: What was the main objective of Testherapy?
knowledge_base.answer: The objective was to create a professional healthcare platform with easy appointment booking, improved user experience, mobile responsiveness, and SEO optimization.

knowledge_base.question: What features were implemented in Testherapy?
knowledge_base.answer: Key features include a modern Healthcare UI/UX, Appointment Booking System, Mobile Responsive Design, SEO-Friendly Structure, and Fast Loading Performance.

knowledge_base.question: What challenges were solved in Testherapy?
knowledge_base.answer: We built trust in the healthcare sector through professional design, clear navigation, and an optimized user experience.

knowledge_base.question: What results were achieved in Testherapy?
knowledge_base.answer: The project resulted in improved user experience, enhanced brand credibility, better mobile accessibility, and faster website performance.

knowledge_base.question: What is Diamonds Or Jewels?
knowledge_base.answer: Diamonds Or Jewels is a luxury jewelry eCommerce website built using WordPress and WooCommerce to provide a premium online shopping experience.

knowledge_base.question: What was the goal of Diamonds Or Jewels?
knowledge_base.answer: The goal was to create an elegant online jewelry store with secure purchasing, premium design, and an optimized shopping experience.

knowledge_base.question: What features were implemented in Diamonds Or Jewels?
knowledge_base.answer: Features include a WooCommerce Store, Product Catalog Management, Secure Checkout, Product Search/Filters, and SEO Optimization.

knowledge_base.question: What challenges were solved in Diamonds Or Jewels?
knowledge_base.answer: We maintained luxury aesthetics while keeping website performance optimized through image optimization and performance improvements.

knowledge_base.question: What results were achieved in Diamonds Or Jewels?
knowledge_base.answer: Achieved a professional luxury brand presence, improved shopping experience, better product discoverability, and enhanced mobile usability.

knowledge_base.question: What is Invoice Builder?
knowledge_base.answer: Invoice Builder is a web application that allows freelancers and businesses to generate professional invoices quickly and efficiently.

knowledge_base.question: What was the objective of Invoice Builder?
knowledge_base.answer: To simplify invoice creation, automate calculations, and improve business productivity.

knowledge_base.question: What features were implemented in Invoice Builder?
knowledge_base.answer: Features include Invoice Generation, Real-Time Calculations, Professional Templates, Client Management, and Download-Ready Invoices.

knowledge_base.question: What challenges were solved in Invoice Builder?
knowledge_base.answer: We created a simple workflow for professional invoicing through an intuitive UI and automated calculations.

knowledge_base.question: What results were achieved in Invoice Builder?
knowledge_base.answer: Achieved faster invoice creation, improved user productivity, and a professional responsive experience.

knowledge_base.question: What is the ChatGPT Clone project?
knowledge_base.answer: ChatGPT Clone is an AI-powered conversational web application that provides real-time chatbot interactions using OpenAI APIs.

knowledge_base.question: What was the objective of the ChatGPT Clone?
knowledge_base.answer: To build a modern AI chat platform with real-time responses, scalable architecture, and a seamless user experience.

knowledge_base.question: What features were implemented in the ChatGPT Clone?
knowledge_base.answer: Implemented AI-powered conversations, real-time responses, chat history management, and a modern dashboard design.

knowledge_base.question: What challenges were solved in the ChatGPT Clone?
knowledge_base.answer: We managed AI response handling and maintained smooth user interactions through optimized API integration and state management.

knowledge_base.question: What results were achieved in the ChatGPT Clone?
knowledge_base.answer: Achieved an interactive AI experience, fast response handling, and a scalable architecture.
